_comment: The Reach Remembers (Boundary Stones, Q1) turn-in keepsake, handed by warden_ossa via file_claim. A Ground-type training token: 1x Hard Stone (the boundary-stone motif + a Ground held item) + 2x Soft Sand + 4x sand. All item ids jar-validated in Cobblemon 1.7.3 (cobblemon:hard_stone, cobblemon:soft_sand present in items.txt; minecraft:sand is vanilla). Reduced quantities keep it a keepsake, not a payout.
